item.title: The Three Steps of Proactive Threat Hunting
item.description: How the CrowdStrike® Falcon OverWatch™ team uses proactive threat hunting to augment existing endpoint protection systems.

item.title: CrowdStrike and NIST 800-53: Now That’s What I Call a “Twofer”
item.description: CrowdStrike Falcon® Host helps companies comply with system protection and monitoring controls identified in NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 4

item.title: Falcon Certified as Legacy AV Replacement - CrowdStrike
item.description: Learn how AV-Comparatives and other 3rd-party sources scored CrowdStrike Falcon® to achieve independent validation & certification to separate the marketing hype from reality.

item.title: Critical Infrastructure: Another Way to Thank For and Protect
item.description: November is Critical Infrastructure Security and Resilience Month, recognizing the importance of protecting our nation’s critical infrastructure.

item.title: Multi-Layered Prevention for the Endpoint
item.description: When it comes to cybersecurity, what an “ounce of prevention” really entails is multiple complementary functions to address the complexity of the attacks.

item.title: CrowdStrike Releases New Update To Falcon Orchestrator
item.description: The next iteration of Orchestrator has now been released. It builds on the PowerShell-based response capabilities to provide new response features.

item.title: Danger Close: Fancy Bear Tracking of Ukrainian Field Artillery Units
item.description: Late in the summer of '16, CrowdStrike Intelligence analysts began investigating a curious Android Package (APK) which contained Russian language artifacts.

item.title: CrowdStrike “Visionary” in the Gartner Magic Quadrant
item.description: Gartner has named CrowdStrike a “Visionary” in the 2017 Magic Quadrant for Endpoint Protection Platforms (EPP).

item.title: Blocking Malicious PowerShell Downloads
item.description: Suspicious PowerShell commands trigger CrowdStrike Falcon®’s behavioral-based detection to stop malware intrusions

item.title: VirusTotal Lookups Are Back, CrowdStrike’s Popular Free Tool
item.description: VirusTotal lookups are back in the new version of CrowdStrike CrowdInspect, a free tool that lists processes and network connections running on your computer.

item.title: Event Stream Processing & Indicators of Attack - CrowdStrike
item.description: Event Stream Processing (ESP) has been a central component of CrowdStrike Falcon®’s IOA approach since CrowdStrike’s inception. In this post we’ll take a closer look at ESP — along with its utility and challenges — in an endpoint protection platform like CrowdStrike Falcon®.

item.title: CrowdStrike Falcon® named "Leader" in IDC MarketScape Report - CrowdStrike
item.description: CrowdStrike has been named a “leader” in the endpoint segment of the IDC MarketScape: Worldwide 2017 Vendor Assessment. The IDC is the latest in a growing list of global analyst firms that have recognized CrowdStrike Falcon®’s best-in-class capabilities.

item.title: W-2 Phishing Scam Adds a New Twist to Wire Transfer Fraud
item.description: The IRS warns of a new phishing scam that combines a W-2 scheme with wire transfer fraud aimed at schools and hospitals

item.title: Securing the Mac-Based Organization - crowdstrike.com
item.description: As more organizations switch to Macs, attacks targeting them are on the rise. A new webcast shows how CrowdStrike protects against Mac-focused threats.

item.title: Inside the Takedown of ZOMBIE SPIDER and the Kelihos Botnet - crowdstrike.com
item.description: New information about the arrest of Pyotr Levashov, the ZOMBIE SPIDER adversary, and CrowdStrike’s role in dismantling the Kelihos botnet.

item.title: Investigating PowerShell: Command and Script Logging
item.description: Investigate Microsoft PowerShell and how it opens up capabilities for attackers & more cybersecurity tips & information on the CrowdStrike blog!

item.title: Are You More Interested in Stopping a Breach or Stopping Malware? - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Are You More Interested in Stopping a Breach or Stopping Malware? While the obvious answer should be both, what would you choose first? Learn more!

item.title: Using OS X FSEvents to Discover Deleted Malicious Artifact
item.description: Using the File System Events artifact CrowdStrike explains how it can help discover the existence of deleted malware files on their blog here.

item.title: Open Source Active Reconnaissance (Red Team)
item.description: Having visibility into an attacker's reconnaissance activities enables organizations to better protect themselves from a breach. Learn more here!

item.title: Reconnaissance Detection (Blue Team) - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Read up on the roles of a blue team in reconnaissance detection & the few things that can be done to counter activity in the early stages of attack!

item.title: Cyber Skirmish: Russia v. Turkey - crowdstrike.com
item.description: On the morning of 24 November 2015 an F-16 operated by the Turkish Air Force dropped into position behind a Russian Su-24 Fencer. Learn more!

item.title: Cyber Security Due-Diligence Questionnaire - CrowdStrike
item.description: With the value of mergers & acquisitions growing year after year, CrowdStrike has established a process to fully vet a target company’s systems, data, and environment to assess and protect those valuable assets being acquired.

item.title: Solving Intractable Performance Problems Through Vertical Engineering
item.description: Increased Security in Windows 10 Anniversary Update (Redstone) Through Dynamic Kernel Address Space Randomization of Page Table Structures.

item.title: State of the Criminal Address | CrowdStrike
item.description: Discovered attacks from criminal groups responsible for the delivery of NewPosThings, MalumPOS and PoSeidon point of sale Malware, as well as Carbanak.

item.title: CrowdResponse Release and new @Tasks modules - crowdstrike.com
item.description: With the ongoing need to effectively & quickly detect and respond to attacks, CrowdStrike is excited to release a new version of CrowdResponse. Learn more!

item.title: CrowdStrike evaluated in Gartner’s Comparison of Endpoint Detection and Response Technologies and Solutions
item.description: Gartner has recently published a comparative assessment called Comparison of Endpoint Detection and Response Technologies and Solutions.

item.title: Read Featured Research & Threat Intel Article by Adam Meyers
item.description: The eCrime actor’s operational profile differs greatly from that of an espionage-focused targeted intrusion actor.

item.title: Delivering HOT New Features | Crowdstrike
item.description: I often hear from Chief Information Security Officers (CISOs) how hard their job is and how often they are in the ‘line of fire’ when bad things happen.

item.title: CrowdStrike Machine Learning and VirusTotal - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Over the past three months, CrowdStrike worked closely with VirusTotal (VT), and we are excited to announce the integration of our anti-malware technology.

item.title: Bear Hunting: Tracking Down COZY BEAR Backdoors
item.description: The recovery of the backdoor illuminates additional indicators organizations can leverage to further scope potential COZY BEAR activity in their networks.
